description: Comprehensive grep survey for L2-as-live references across all CURRENT/LIVING governance documents. Produced for Phase 14G lockdown verification.
grep_patterns: \bL2\b (word-boundary, filtering L2.5 and L2 archive variants)

summary.unamended_rationale: PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE_v2_2.md contains many L2+ principle references (B.1–B.12 style) and the §C.2 section with full historical L2 operational description. The brief mandates annotating, not deleting. Key structural annotations added (§C.2 header, ASCII pyramid, file tree). Remaining hits in §C.2 body are load-bearing historical context preserved per brief instructions. CLAUDE.md B.1/B.3 L1/L2 boundary references updated to L1/L2.5 and L2.5+.

downstream_flags_for_14G: PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE_v2_2.md §B architectural principles (B.1–B.12) still reference 'L2+' and 'L1/L2 boundary' in verbatim form. CLAUDE.md §I summaries have been updated; §B is preserved per v2.2 design. Phase 14G should confirm whether §B verbatim principle text warrants a v2.3 bump.

DATA_INTEGRITY_AUDIT_PLAN_v1_0.md has no frontmatter status field — the brief classified it for amendment despite no explicit CURRENT status. Phase 14G should consider adding a frontmatter block to bring it under standard governance.

00_ARCHITECTURE/CLAUDE.md (the 00_ARCHITECTURE subfolder CLAUDE.md) references PROJECT_ARCHITECTURE_v2_1 — this file has a separate LIVE_DRIFT finding that falls under GOVERNANCE_STACK or general refresh; it is not in Phase 14F scope but should be tracked.
